windows.transcript: Here are the product features of this candle making kit. The lecture cut plate is equipped with 5 speed heating mode and it's easy to
windows.old_description: White wax melts in the metal pan on the electronic hotplate, stirred with a stick.
windows.embed_text_v2: Switching on an electric candle-making hot plate with a ceramic pouring pitcher of soy wax flakes on the burner; flat lay of kit including jar with wick sticker, fragrance oil, thermometer, popsicle stir stick, caution labels.
windows.summary_v2: Flat-lay overview of a candle-making kit (hot plate, pouring pitcher of soy wax flakes, jar with wick sticker, fragrance, thermometer, labels) as the maker turns the electronic hot plate on to start melting.

tags_v2.action: powering on hot plate to start melting wax
tags_v2.on_screen_text: Mommy Che Dugan watermark top-right; CAUTION sticker text on label sheet; OFF on hot plate dial

seconds_v2.desc: Flat lay on a wood plank surface of a candle making kit: black electric hot plate centre, a white ceramic pouring pitcher of solid white soy wax flakes on it; small fragrance oil bottle, sheet of yellow caution stickers, sheet of small square wick stickers, popsicle stir stick, glass jar with a wick sticker inside and tabbed wick on top, screwdriver-style tools and a metal thermometer at right.
A bare hand enters from lower right and reaches toward the hot plate's dial.
Hand grips the silver dial of the hot plate; OFF indicator visible.
Hand begins to turn the dial — about to switch the hot plate on.
Hand continues turning the dial clockwise from OFF to a heating setting.
Hand lingers on the dial; red power indicator on the hot plate now glows.
Hand relaxes on the counter beside the dial; hot plate now powered on, pitcher of solid wax sits on the burner.
Hand stays near the dial; arrangement of kit items unchanged; wax flakes in pitcher beginning to be heated.
